text: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (Save the girl child, educate the girl child) launched by PM Modi on 22 Jan 2015 from Panipat, Haryana. Aims to address declining child sex ratio and promote girl education. Results: Sex ratio at birth improved from 918 (2014-15) to 934 (2021-22). Girl enrollment in secondary education increased. Budget: Rs 1,000+ crore.

Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana is a savings scheme for girls under Beti Bachao. Parents can open account for girl child under 10 years. Interest rate: 8.2% (as of Jan 2024). Minimum deposit: Rs 250/year, Maximum: Rs 1.5 lakh/year. Maturity: 21 years from account opening. Tax benefits under Section 80C. Over 3 crore accounts opened.

Mahila Shakti Kendra provides one-stop support to women affected by violence. Includes shelter, police assistance, legal aid, medical aid, and counseling. Women Helpline: 181. Covers all districts. National Commission for Women (NCW) oversees women's rights protection. Chairperson: Rekha Sharma (till 2024).

PMMVY provides Rs 5,000 cash incentive to pregnant and lactating women for first living child. Since PMMVY 2.0 (2024): Rs 5,000 for first child, Rs 6,000 for second child (if girl). Over 3.6 crore women benefited. Aims to improve maternal nutrition and reduce infant mortality. Direct benefit transfer to bank accounts.

Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam (Women's Reservation Act) 2023 reserves 33% seats in Lok Sabha and state legislative assemblies for women. Passed by Parliament in September 2023 in the new Parliament building. Sub-reservation for SC/ST women within the reserved seats. Implementation after delimitation exercise post next Census.

PM MUDRA Yojana disproportionately benefits women entrepreneurs. Over 70% of MUDRA loans go to women borrowers. Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs 50,000), Kishore (Rs 50,000 to Rs 5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5 lakh to Rs 10 lakh). No collateral required. Over 45 crore loans disbursed since 2015, Rs 27 lakh crore total disbursement.
